author: JungyupLee
name: PR #1855 stack + MP3 marker-pair fusion + alias smear boundary
blurb: Built on PR #1855 (11L XSA + LQER asym int4 + SparseAttnGate + BOS-fixed SmearGate + Polar-Express MuonEqR + fused softcapped CE + GPTQ int6 + int7 embed + per-row int8 attn-gate + per-group lrzip+brotli + phased TTT + 9-hparam stack). Two orthogonal additions: (1) MP3 marker-pair fusion — 3 alias donor tokens for [SPACE,TITLE]/[SPACE,ALLCAPS]/[SPACE,CAPNEXT], 8.47% train-token saving, word X preserved (no d=1 collapse); (2) alias smear boundary — SmearGate fully disabled (ALIAS_PREV_SMEAR_SCALE=0.0) at positions immediately following an alias token, since alias donors already encode dense (SPACE + marker) signal at one position. Code patch: +62/-2 lines vs PR #1855's train_gpt.py. Single-seed (42) phased TTT val_bpb 1.05889 beats PR #1855 author's 3-seed mean 1.06108 by 0.00219 BPB.
eval: phased TTT (3 cumulative phases at doc-boundaries 833/1666/2500, LoRA rank=80, eval_time 691.3s)
technique_summary: PR #1855 stack + MP3 marker-pair fusion (3 alias donors, 8.47% token saving) + alias smear boundary (ALIAS_PREV_SMEAR_SCALE=0.0)
